svg.title: Chapter 17 boundary expansion figure
svg.desc: A near-control zoom chart, two regime-sweep line charts, and two adversarial-control grouped bar charts generated from the Chapter 17 artifacts.
svg.text: Near-control zoom, regime sweeps, and adversarial controls generated from the Gnosis evidence artifacts
Parity at the control end, then visible divergence as recombination demand rises
linear advantage (eval MSE) over the best nonlinear strategy
From one-path parity to full cancellation
From one-expert parity to dual-activation demand
Where sparse selection is the right final inductive bias
Where sparse selection or early stop wins on sample efficiency
